g.title: Default state: Scanning for delimiters, pipes, or command starts.
Strong quoting: No expansion performed until closing quote.
Weak quoting: Variable expansion ($) and backticks still active.

ol.li: fork(): Parent creates two child processes.

dup2():
P1: dup2(fds[1], 1) (Stdout to pipe write)
P2: dup2(fds[0], 0) (Stdin to pipe read)
close(): All unused pipe ends closed in both children and parent to ensure EOF signal.

ul.li: If delimiter is unquoted (<<EOF): Expand \$VAR and `cmd`.
If delimiter is quoted (<<'EOF'): Treat content as literal string.

g.title: Default state: Scanning for delimiters, pipes, or command starts.
Strong quoting: No expansion performed until closing quote.
Weak quoting: Variable expansion ($) and backticks still active.
